_comment: Whisper writes numerals ($89.50, 2026, 1145) but the speaker said words.
For a character-level TTS that is a text-audio mismatch, so we rewrite the
transcript into the spoken form actually uttered. Matched by substring, not by
clip id, so the map survives re-segmentation with different --min-s/--max-s.

fixes.March 3rd, 2026 at a quarter past nine: March third, twenty twenty-six, at a quarter past nine
